description: Composition Blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Revel in effortless style with this T-shirt that flaunts your youthful, city-bred fashionista attitude. Tailored to a beautiful finish, this tee is designed to offer a snug Fit and flaunt your chiseled body. Slip into jeans along with sneakers shoes to complement this trendy T-shirt. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
